export.header: NoteSentry conversation export (data stays on this device)
export.footer: Exported by NoteSentry. All data is local; please handle it per the PhysioNet DUA.

report.title: Case report: {{title}}
report.govNote: Generated by local Ollama; every tool call was human-approved (HITL) and all data stays on this device.
report.auditEmpty: No tool calls recorded for this case.
report.pharmacyIntCols: | Drug A | Drug B | Severity | Mechanism / recommendation |
report.footer: Case report generated by NoteSentry for medical-education / clinical-support use only — not a diagnosis. All data stays on this device; handle it per the PhysioNet DUA.

governance.title: NoteSentry Governance & Audit Report
governance.govNote: This report aggregates the local audit log; every tool call was human-approved (HITL) and all data stays on this device.
governance.byToolCols: | Tool | Source server | Calls | Approved | Rejected | Errors |
governance.bySessionCols: | Session | Calls | Approved | Rejected | First–last time |
governance.trailCols: | Time | Tool | Server | Decision | Summary / error |
governance.footer: Governance & audit report generated by NoteSentry for AI governance, transparency and accountability. All data stays on this device; handle it per the PhysioNet DUA.

error.ollamaNotLocal: Ollama address {{host}} is not local. To keep data on-device, only localhost / 127.0.0.1 are allowed.
error.ollamaBlocked: Ollama address is not local and was blocked.
error.toolServerNotFound: Cannot find the MCP server for tool {{name}}, or it is not connected.
